title: Pistol for a Hundred Coffins
writer: Marco Leto, Eduardo Manzanos, Vittorio Salerno
actors: Peter Lee Lawrence, John Ireland, Gloria Osuna
plot: Returning from the civil war Jim Slade discovers his parents dead at their farm. It is said that the gang under the lead of Corbett has committed the crime. Jim now goes for revenge but things turn out to be more complicated than ...
